app_idea: Idle Compute Co-op: rent idle CPU-only laptops/desktops for small AI jobs (embeddings, inference, preprocessing, tiny fine-tunes), matched by hardware spec and priced fairly by a verified reliability score, with simulated crypto settlement (credit ledger) and redundant-verification trust.
backend_language: Node.js + Express + TypeScript (ESM, run via tsx)
last_successful_step: Dockerfile, nginx config, and entrypoint.sh written; Docker build/run NOT yet verified (Docker Desktop not installed on this machine)
current_status: Full app built and verified locally via npm dev servers end-to-end (backend API + scheduler simulation + frontend UI + /api proxy). Docker image untested.
current_blocker: Docker Desktop is not installed on this machine, so `docker build`/`docker run` for the single final image has not been verified.
next_action: Install Docker Desktop (winget install -e --id Docker.DockerDesktop --source winget), then run: docker build -t hackathon-app:local . && mkdir -p data && docker run --rm -p 9080:9080 -p 8090:8090 -v "$(pwd)/data:/app/data" hackathon-app:local — then verify http://localhost:9080 and http://localhost:9080/api/health.
